name: HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_VL
query: SELECT HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.TCAT_EXPR_RESULT_ID TCAT_EXPR_RESULT_ID, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.TCAT_ID TCAT_ID, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.EXPRESSION_GROUP_ID EXPRESSION_GROUP_ID, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_TL.USER_DESCRIPTION USER_DESCRIPTION, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.LEFT_PARENTHESIS_NUM LEFT_PARENTHESIS_NUM, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.TIME_ATRB_FLD_ID TIME_ATRB_FLD_ID, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.VALUE_TYPE VALUE_TYPE, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.VALUE_ID VALUE_ID, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.OPERATOR OPERATOR, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.RIGHT_PARENTHESIS_NUM RIGHT_PARENTHESIS_NUM, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.EXPR_ROW_IDENTIFIER EXPR_ROW_IDENTIFIER, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.DISPLAY_VALUE DISPLAY_VALUE, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.VALUE_CHAR VALUE_CHAR, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.VALUE_DATE VALUE_DATE, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.VALUE_TIMESTAMP VALUE_TIMESTAMP, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.SGUID SGUID FROM HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B, HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_TL WHERE HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_B.TCAT_EXPR_RESULT_ID = HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_TL.TCAT_EXPR_RESULT_ID AND HWM_TCAT_EXPR_RESULTS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
